data.title: Global CDN Deployment
data.description: A global Content Delivery Network (CDN) ensures fast content delivery and uptime.

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Apple's backend uses a microservices architecture for scalability and maintainability.

data.title: Responsive Web Design
data.description: Flexible grid layout and images make the site responsive across devices.

data.title: High Availability Infrastructure
data.description: Redundant systems ensure continuous service, even under failure conditions.

data.title: Server-side Rendering
data.description: Pages are pre-rendered on the server to improve performance.
